expect: SPACES GET CREATED — one per leg (Cairo, the safari/Ngorongoro leg, Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam), each with its own agent, not one generic space
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

[{"value":"Purpose & context\nVasilis is planning a fully booked international trip in August 2026, traveling with a companion named Athina Mari. The trip spans Cairo (Egypt), Arusha and the northern Tanzania safari circuit, Zanzibar, and Dar es Salaam, running August 3–20. The trip combines cultural sightseeing in Cairo, a group camping safari through Tarangire, Lake Manyara, and Ngorongoro Crate…

contacts.name: Richard — Suricata Safaris Ltd
contacts.notes: Main contact for safari. 3-day group camping safari Aug 7-9. $240 deposit paid; $960 balance due. Ask about extra ranger tip (~5,000 TZS cash at gate).

contacts.name: Emmanuel
contacts.notes: Safari driver-guide (NOT Richard — confirmed from voice memo). Led the Ngorongoro crater day.

contacts.name: Eileen Hotel, Cairo
contacts.notes: 21 Youssef El-Gendy St, Abdeen, Downtown Cairo. Near Tahrir Square/Nile Corniche. Aug 3-5.

contacts.name: The Rock Restaurant, Zanzibar
contacts.notes: Aug 15, 18:00–20:00, 2 adults. Outdoor seating for sunset views. Fully paid ($46).

contacts.name: Ngorongoro Conservation Area Authority
contacts.notes: Hotline: +255 27 253 7046. Karatu Information Office: +255 27 253 4068. P.O. Box 1, Ngorongoro Crater, Arusha.

contacts.name: Ayla Beach House, Zanzibar
contacts.notes: Kiwengwa beach accommodation Aug 13-17. North coast (Nungwi area).

contacts.name: Sunny Shore B&B, Dar es Salaam
Ramses Hilton, Cairo
contacts.notes: Departure stopover Aug 19-20. Base for Islamic Cairo/Citadel/Khan el-Khalili.

contacts.name: Tanzania e-Visa Portal
contacts.notes: Mandatory online e-visa ($50/person). Visa-on-arrival discontinued Jan 2025.

costs.notes: Aegean A3932 (Aug 3) ref ZZJQUU; EgyptAir CAI→DAR (Aug 4); Precision Air TC144 DAR→ARK (Aug 5); TC145 ARK→ZNZ (Aug 11); EgyptAir DAR→CAI (Aug 19); Aegean A3935 CAI→ATH (Aug 20) ref ZZL22S. ~€2,707 total.

costs.item: Suricata Safaris package — 3-day group camping safari, 2 pax
costs.notes: $240 deposit paid; $960 balance due on arrival. Pay cash (post-2009 USD notes) or Pesapal online (+5% surcharge): payments.pesapal.com/suricatasafaris.

costs.item: Suricata Safaris — balance due on arrival
costs.notes: Cash preferred (post-2009 USD notes) or Pesapal +5%.

costs.item: The Rock Restaurant dinner, Zanzibar, Aug 15 (paid)
costs.notes: 2 adults, 18:00–20:00 sitting, 2x Tropical Passion Fruit Cheesecake. Outdoor seating requested. Booking ref: booking@therockrestaurantzanzibar.com.

costs.item: Zanzibar local driving permit (~$15, per driver)
costs.notes: Valid up to 3 months. Most rental companies arrange with license photo 24h before arrival. Carry IDP + local permit at police checkpoints.
Mandatory online at visa.immigration.go.tz. Visa-on-arrival no longer available as of Jan 2025.
Both travelers apply separately. Requires mandatory printed copy.

costs.item: Zanzibar mandatory travel insurance, ZIC (2 travelers × $44)
costs.notes: Separate mandatory insurance from Zanzibar Insurance Corporation.

costs.item: Ngorongoro Conservation Area entry permit (2 pax × $70.80, 1 day, non-EA adult)
costs.notes: Non-East African adult rate: $70.80/person/day. From official NCA tariff schedule.

costs.item: Ngorongoro crater service fee (2 pax × $70.80, non-EA adult)
costs.notes: Crater service fee per person per entry. Non-EA adult rate.

costs.item: Ngorongoro crater vehicle descent fee (per vehicle/trip, non-EA)
Tarangire NP entrance (2 pax × $59, peak season)
costs.notes: Peak season rate for non-EA adults.

costs.item: Lake Manyara NP entrance (2 pax × $59, peak season)
costs.notes: Peak season rate for non-EA adults.

costs.item: Lodging total (all legs excl. safari package)
costs.notes: Sum of all accommodation costs from the legs sheet: Eileen Hotel ($102) + Serengeti Villa ($62) + Kutoka Lodge ($96) + Treasures of Zanzibar ($100) + Ayla Beach House ($304) + Sunny Shore B&B ($200) + Ramses Hilton ($87).

itinerary.notes: Near Tahrir Square/Nile Corniche. Grand Egyptian Museum and Pyramids of Giza sightseeing. Fly out Aug 4 at 22:40.
Phone: +255 757 757 928. Arrive from DAR via Precision Air TC144 at 12:00.

itinerary.leg: Safari circuit — Tarangire / Lake Manyara / Ngorongoro Crater
itinerary.lodging: Suricata Safaris (Twiga camps + Jevas Hotel, package)
itinerary.notes: Suricata Safaris Ltd 3-day group camping safari. Tarangire (Twiga Camp Site, FB) → Lake Manyara (Twiga Camp Site, FB) → Ngorongoro Crater (Jevas Hotel, HB). Driver-guide: Emmanuel. $240 deposit paid; $960 balance due on arrival in cash (post-2009 USD notes).
Fly ARK→ZNZ Precision Air TC145 12:40–13:40. Explore Stone Town.
North coast — Nungwi area for better swimming. The Rock Restaurant dinner Aug 15, 18:00–20:00.
Arrive by ferry from Zanzibar. Kivukoni Fish Market, Kariakoo Market, National Museum, Coco Beach, Bongoyo Island.
Islamic Cairo, the Citadel, Khan el-Khalili bazaar, Coptic Cairo. Fly CAI→ATH Aug 20 19:55–22:00.

park_fees.subcategory: Entry Permit — per person per day
park_fees.notes: Valid for one entry within 24 hours.

park_fees.subcategory: Entry Permit — per person per day
Entry Permit — per person per day
Safari crew fee per person per day
park_fees.notes: Tour guide/drivers/camping crew with valid IDs.
Per person per entry. Crater descent gates close at 16:00.
Non-EA citizen rate. Only 4×4 vehicles up to 3,500kg allowed on crater floor.
Must be reserved and confirmed prior to arrival.
Must be accompanied by NCAA armed ranger.

park_fees.subcategory: Olduvai Gorge / Shifting Sand / Laetoli Footprints

park_fees.notes: Locally registered balloon landing fees vary by size.

photos.title: Stone Town Courtyard
photos.description: A bright courtyard in Stone Town, Zanzibar — tall white building with arched windows, dark wooden balconies, carved railings. Classic Zanzibari architecture.

photos.title: Ngorongoro Crater — one of the best days
photos.description: The Ngorongoro crater day was "one of the best days" of the trip. Driver-guide Emmanuel led the descent. Bought 2 beaded bracelets from a Maasai lady for ~$20-25 USD (~35,000 TZS).

photos.title: The Rock Restaurant
photos.description: The Rock Restaurant, Zanzibar — Aug 15 dinner at 18:00. Outdoor seating for sunset and star views over the Indian Ocean.

photos.title: Tarangire National Park
photos.description: Tarangire — famous for its elephant herds and baobab trees. First day of the safari circuit.

photos.title: Lake Manyara
photos.description: Lake Manyara National Park — known for tree-climbing lions and flamingos. Second day of safari.

questions.question: Extra ranger tip at Ngorongoro gate — ~5,000 TZS cash?
questions.context: Emmanuel mentioned an extra ranger tip of ~5,000 TZS cash at the gate, separate from park fees. Ask Richard at Suricata Safaris before settling the safari balance.

questions.question: Safari balance payment method — cash or Pesapal?
questions.context: $960 balance due on arrival. Cash (post-2009 USD notes) preferred; Pesapal online adds 5% surcharge. Confirm with Richard.

questions.question: Zanzibar local driving permit — arrange in advance?
questions.context: ~$15, valid up to 3 months. Most rental companies arrange with license photo 24h before arrival. Vasilis holds IDP.

questions.question: Zanzibar mandatory travel insurance (ZIC) — purchase before arrival?
questions.context: $44/person, mandatory for Zanzibar entry. Confirm whether to buy online in advance or on arrival.

questions.question: Tanzania e-visa application timeline
questions.context: $50/person at visa.immigration.go.tz. Both travelers need to apply. Visa-on-arrival no longer available.

questions.question: Egypt e-visa — both travelers apply separately, print copies
questions.context: Multiple-entry, $65/person. Mandatory printed copy required. Apply before departure.

questions.question: Dar es Salaam ferry from Zanzibar — book in advance?
questions.context: Traveling Zanzibar → Dar es Salaam by ferry on Aug 17. Confirm ferry schedule and booking.

questions.question: Ngorongoro warm layers — pack check
questions.context: Ngorongoro nights are cold. Confirm warm layers (fleece, jacket) are packed. Decathlon Forclaz trekking line recommended.

questions.question: Precision Air luggage — soft bags only?
questions.context: Flights TC144/TC145 have luggage restrictions favoring soft bags. Confirm baggage allowance and pack accordingly.

questions.question: DEET-based insect repellent — purchase before trip
questions.context: Essential for safari and Zanzibar. Recommended to source from Decathlon in Greece.

schema.title: Contacts
schema.description: Important contacts for the Tanzania trip — safari operators, hotels, restaurants, and emergency numbers.

role.description: Role (e.g. Safari operator, Hotel, Restaurant, Emergency)

schema.title: Costs
schema.description: All trip cost line items with amount, currency, category, paid/unpaid status, and notes.

category.description: Category: flights, safari, dining, transport, visa, insurance, park fees, lodging, other

paid.description: Whether this item has been paid

schema.title: Itinerary
schema.description: Trip legs with dates, lodging, and notes for Vasileios & Athina Mari Tanzania trip, Aug 2026.

schema.title: NCA Park Fees
schema.description: Official Ngorongoro Conservation Area tariff schedule — seeded from the NCA PDF.

category.description: Fee category (e.g. Entry Permit, Crater Service, Camping, Vehicle)

non_ea_usd.description: Non-East African citizen rate in USD

ea_tzs.description: East African citizen rate in TZS

schema.title: Photos
schema.description: Photo gallery entries for the Tanzania trip — reference images with descriptions.

description.description: What the photo shows or the story behind it

schema.title: Open Questions
schema.description: Open questions, loose ends, and things to confirm before or during the trip.

question.description: The open question or item to resolve

context.description: Why this matters and who to ask
